installCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.33.0 --activate && pnpm install
buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @dripl/common build && pnpm --filter @dripl/utils build && pnpm --filter @dripl/db build && cd apps/http-server && npx esbuild --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=api/index.js --external:@prisma/client --packages=external api/index.ts
